title: x1 Texture Pack
description: This is a resource pack in which everything looks like 1x1 pixel! Try it for fun!
body: This is just a resource pack with resolution of **1x1** pixel (the actual resolution of textures is normal (16x16 pixels), but it looks like 1x1 pixel)! You can use it for fun, or for content making such as making videos about x1, x4, x16, etc. texture packs. I saw a few different x4 texture packs, **but I never saw an x1**. Note: it was made with some help of AI.
